hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'uv.lock'; then echo 'BLOCK: uv.lock is auto-generated — run uv sync instead' >&2; exit 2; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then cd plugins/karpathy-llm-wiki/llm-wiki-core && uv run ruff format --quiet "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check --fix --quiet "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
